live.title: Sunday Liturgy Live
live.description: Join us for live worship every Sunday morning

about.title: About Our Church
about.description: Saint Mary Coptic Orthodox Church is a vibrant community dedicated to spreading the Orthodox Christian faith and fostering spiritual growth. Founded with a mission to serve the faithful, we embrace the ancient traditions of the Coptic Orthodox Church while engaging with today's world.
about.vision: To be a beacon of Orthodox faith — a place where all are welcomed, spiritually nourished, and transformed by the love of Christ.
about.mission: To serve our community with love, teach the Gospel of Christ, and preserve the rich heritage of the Coptic Orthodox tradition for future generations.

clergy.name: Father Shenouda Mikhail
clergy.title: Senior Priest
clergy.bio: Father Shenouda has faithfully served our congregation for over 15 years, providing spiritual guidance, pastoral care, and leading our community in worship.

clergy.name: Father Marcus Girgis
clergy.title: Associate Priest
clergy.bio: Father Marcus oversees youth ministry and community outreach, bringing energy and devotion to all aspects of parish life.

clergy.name: Deacon Bishoy Naguib
clergy.title: Senior Deacon
clergy.bio: Deacon Bishoy assists in all liturgical services and leads our celebrated choir and music ministry with great dedication.

ministries.name: Sunday School
ministries.description: Comprehensive educational programs for children and youth to learn about the Orthodox faith through engaging lessons and activities.

ministries.name: Youth Ministry
ministries.description: Engaging activities, retreats, and spiritual guidance for teens and young adults to grow in faith together.

ministries.name: Women's Fellowship
ministries.description: A warm community for women of all ages to connect, support one another, and grow spiritually through prayer and service.

ministries.name: Men's Group
ministries.description: Brotherhood, accountability, and spiritual development for men through regular gatherings, service projects, and retreats.

ministries.name: Choir & Music Ministry
ministries.description: Leading the congregation in sacred worship through traditional Coptic chanting, hymns, and liturgical music.

ministries.name: Community Outreach
ministries.description: Serving those in need within our local community through food drives, volunteer work, and charitable initiatives.

sermons.title: The Power of Unwavering Faith
sermons.speaker: Father Shenouda Mikhail
sermons.description: A powerful reflection on how faith sustains us through life's most challenging trials.

sermons.title: Called to Love One Another
sermons.speaker: Father Marcus Girgis
sermons.description: Exploring Christ's commandment to love as the foundation of our Orthodox life.

sermons.title: Redemption and New Life in Christ
sermons.speaker: Father Shenouda Mikhail
sermons.description: Understanding the transformative grace of Christ's sacrifice and our call to renewed living.

events.title: Pentecost Feast Day Celebration
events.description: Join us for a special Liturgy and festive gathering celebrating the feast of Pentecost with the whole community.

events.title: Family Summer BBQ
events.description: A beloved annual tradition — bring the whole family for food, fellowship, and fun in the church courtyard.

events.title: Annual Charity Gala Dinner
events.description: Supporting families in need through our annual charity dinner. Tickets available at the church office.

events.title: Youth Summer Retreat
events.description: Three days of spiritual renewal, team-building, and fun for all youth aged 13-25. Registration required.
